subcodes.first_line: O Shaykh! Upon thee be the glory of God, His grace, His bounty and His mercy. Some time hath elapsed since any trace from my pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب شیخ علیک بهاء الله و فضله و جوده و رحمته چون چندی بود که باثار قلمیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat]
